_comment: Example configuration showcasing different link configuration formats.

links.name: .agents
links._comment: Format A: Mapping for all platforms. This folder will be linked on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

links.name: nvim
links._comment: Format B: Omit platforms. This link is only configured for Windows and Linux. It will be silently skipped on macOS.

links.name: hammerspoon
links._comment: Format C: Platform-specific tool. This link is only configured for macOS and will be skipped on Windows and Linux.

links.name: generic-tool
links._comment: Format D: Universal string path. If the path is identical across all systems, you can specify it directly as a string.
